labacts.name: Division Algorithm
labacts.description: Computes the quotient and remainder for two integers using the formal division algorithm.

labacts.name: Euclidean
labacts.description: Finds the greatest common divisor (GCD) and least common multiple (LCM) of two integers by repeated division.

labacts.name: Collatz Sequence
labacts.description: Generates a sequence from a positive odd integer. If odd, multiply by 3 and add 1. If even, divide by 2, until reaching 1.

labacts.name: Fibonacci
labacts.description: A recursive sequence where F(0)=0, F(1)=1, and F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2) for n >= 2.

labacts.name: Lucas
labacts.description: A recursive sequence where L(0)=2, L(1)=1, and L(n) = L(n-1) + L(n-2) for n >= 2.

labacts.name: Tribonacci
labacts.description: A recursive sequence where T(0)=0, T(1)=0, T(2)=1, and T(n) = T(n-1) + T(n-2) + T(n-3) for n >= 3.

labacts.name: Palindrome
labacts.description: Evaluates a string to check if it reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring spaces and capitalization.
